title: helianthemum polifolium var. apenninum
intro: Helianthemum polifolium var. apenninum is a flowering plant species also known as rock rose, belonging to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Helianthemum polifolium var. apenninum include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of rock rose include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
